title: Glorious Glassy Uruguayan Beef Brochette
description: A pungent and energizing Uruguayan dish featuring sherry and broiled beef, perfect for a special occasion, this recipe is onion and garlic free
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together sherry, olive oil, lemon juice, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Broil the beef skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they reach an internal temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the beef is cooking, combine the beef broth and gelatin in a small saucepan and heat over low heat, stirring until the gelatin is dissolved.
Remove the beef from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the beef brochette with the warm gelatin sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with bay leaves and serve immediately.
